parameters.jsCode: const crypto=require('crypto');const b=$json.body||$json,p=b.payload||b;const resume=Boolean(b.project_id||p.project_id);const required=['novel_name','target_episode_count','episode_duration_seconds','visual_style','aspect_ratio','target_platform','test_mode'];const miss=required.filter(k=>p[k]===undefined||p[k]===null||p[k]==='');if(miss.length)throw new Error('INVALID_INPUT: missing '+miss.join(','));if(!p.novel_text&&!p.novel_source&&!resume)throw new Error('INVALID_INPUT: novel_text or novel_source is required');if(!Number.isInteger(Number(p.target_episode_count))||Number(p.target_episode_count)<=0)throw new Error('INVALID_INPUT: target_episode_count');if(!Number.isInteger(Number(p.episode_duration_seconds))||Number(p.episode_duration_seconds)<=0)throw new Error('INVALID_INPUT: episode_duration_seconds');const idem=b.idempotency_key||p.idempotency_key||crypto.createHash('sha256').update(JSON.stringify([p.novel_name,p.novel_source||'',p.novel_text||'',p.target_episode_count,p.target_platform])).digest('hex');const project_id=b.project_id||p.project_id||`p_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'')}_${idem.slice(0,12)}`;const trace_id=b.trace_id||`trace_${crypto.randomUUID()}`,task_id=`task_${crypto.randomUUID()}`;const config={chunk_max_chars:Number($env.CHUNK_MAX_CHARS||12000),chunk_overlap_chars:Number($env.CHUNK_OVERLAP_CHARS||500),source_type:p.novel_text?'text':'local_file'};return [{json:{project_id,trace_id,task_id,idempotency_key:`${project_id}:orchestrator:${project_id}:1:${resume?'resume':'run'}`,action:resume?'resume':'run',generation_version:Number(b.generation_version||1),test_mode:Boolean(p.test_mode),stage:'orchestrator',payload:p,config,started_ms:Date.now()}}];

parameters.query: WITH p AS (INSERT INTO drama.projects(project_id,novel_name,target_episode_count,episode_duration_seconds,visual_style,aspect_ratio,target_platform,current_stage,status,test_mode,config) VALUES($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,'created','running',$8,$9::jsonb) ON CONFLICT(project_id) DO UPDATE SET status=CASE WHEN drama.projects.status IN ('failed','pending') OR $10='resume' THEN 'running' ELSE drama.projects.status END,error_message=NULL RETURNING project_id), t AS (INSERT INTO drama.workflow_tasks(task_id,trace_id,project_id,workflow_stage,action,entity_type,entity_id,generation_version,idempotency_key,status,max_retries,input_data,started_at) VALUES($11,$12,$1,'orchestrator',$10,'project',$1,$13,$14,'running',$15,$16::jsonb,now()) ON CONFLICT(idempotency_key) DO UPDATE SET status=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $10='resume' AND drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count<drama.workflow_tasks.max_retries THEN 'running' ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.status END,retry_count=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $10='resume' THEN drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count+1 ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count END RETURNING status,output_data) SELECT t.status,t.output_data,$16::jsonb AS request FROM t;
UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage='novel_import',status='running' WHERE project_id=$1 RETURNING $1::text AS project_id;
UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage='chunk_analysis',status='running' WHERE project_id=$1 RETURNING $1::text AS project_id,$2::text AS novel_id;
UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage='story_bible',status='running' WHERE project_id=$1 RETURNING $1::text AS project_id,$2::text AS novel_id;

WITH p AS (UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage='review',status='waiting_review' WHERE project_id=$1), t AS (UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks SET status='completed',completed_at=now(),output_data=jsonb_build_object('success',true,'project_id',$1,'trace_id',$2::text,'stage','orchestrator','status','waiting_review','data_ref',$3::jsonb,'metrics',jsonb_build_object('duration_ms',$4::bigint),'error',NULL) WHERE idempotency_key=$5 RETURNING output_data) SELECT output_data FROM t;

parameters.jsCode: const req=$('Validate Project Request').item.json;const src=$json;const err=src.error&&typeof src.error==='object'?src.error:{code:'ORCHESTRATOR_ERROR',message:src.error?.message||src.message||'stage failed',retryable:/429|timeout|5\d\d|network/i.test(src.message||'')};return [{json:{response:{success:false,project_id:req.project_id,trace_id:req.trace_id,stage:src.stage||'orchestrator',status:'failed',data_ref:null,metrics:{},error:err},project_id:req.project_id,key:req.idempotency_key}}];

parameters.query: WITH p AS (UPDATE drama.projects SET status='failed',error_message=$1 WHERE project_id=$2),t AS (UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks SET status='failed',error_code=$3,error_message=$1,output_data=$4::jsonb,completed_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$5) SELECT $4::jsonb AS response;

parameters.jsCode: const b=$json.body||$json,a=b.action||'resume';if(!b.project_id)throw new Error('PROJECT_NOT_FOUND: project_id required');if(!['review','resume','retry','regenerate'].includes(a))throw new Error('BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED: unsupported action');if(a==='review'&&(!b.review_id||!['approved','rejected','pending'].includes(b.review_status)))throw new Error('BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED: review_id/review_status');return [{json:{...b,action:a,trace_id:b.trace_id||`trace_review_${Date.now()}`,generation_version:Number(b.generation_version||1),test_mode:Boolean(b.test_mode)}}];

parameters.query: WITH r0 AS(SELECT * FROM drama.review_tasks WHERE review_id=$1 AND project_id=$2),r AS(UPDATE drama.review_tasks SET review_status=$3,review_comment=$4,rejection_reason=$5,revision_instruction=$6,reviewed_at=CASE WHEN $3 IN('approved','rejected')THEN now() ELSE NULL END WHERE review_id=$1 AND project_id=$2 RETURNING *),b0 AS(UPDATE drama.story_bibles SET status=CASE WHEN $3='approved'THEN'approved'WHEN $3='rejected'THEN'rejected'ELSE status END WHERE story_bible_id=(SELECT entity_id FROM r0 WHERE entity_type='story_bible')),s0 AS(UPDATE drama.seasons SET status=CASE WHEN $3='approved'THEN'approved'WHEN $3='rejected'THEN'rejected'ELSE status END WHERE season_id=(SELECT entity_id FROM r0 WHERE entity_type='season')),eo AS(UPDATE drama.episode_outlines SET status=CASE WHEN $3='approved'THEN'approved'WHEN $3='rejected'THEN'rejected'ELSE status END WHERE season_id=(SELECT entity_id FROM r0 WHERE entity_type='season')),es AS(UPDATE drama.episode_scripts SET status=CASE WHEN $3='approved'THEN'approved'WHEN $3='rejected'THEN'rejected'ELSE status END WHERE script_id=(SELECT entity_id FROM r0 WHERE entity_type='episode_script')),bd AS(UPDATE drama.storyboards SET status=CASE WHEN $3='approved'THEN'approved'WHEN $3='rejected'THEN'rejected'ELSE status END WHERE storyboard_id=(SELECT entity_id FROM r0 WHERE entity_type='storyboard')),sh AS(UPDATE drama.storyboard_shots SET status=CASE WHEN $3='approved'THEN'approved'WHEN $3='rejected'THEN'rejected'ELSE status END WHERE storyboard_id=(SELECT entity_id FROM r0 WHERE entity_type='storyboard')),p AS(UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage=CASE WHEN $3='approved' AND(SELECT entity_type FROM r0)='story_bible'THEN'story_bible_approved' WHEN $3='approved' AND(SELECT entity_type FROM r0)='season'THEN'season_outline_approved' WHEN $3='approved' AND(SELECT entity_type FROM r0)='episode_script'THEN'episode_script_approved' WHEN $3='approved' AND(SELECT entity_type FROM r0)='storyboard'THEN'storyboard_approved' WHEN $3='rejected' AND(SELECT entity_type FROM r0)='season'THEN'story_bible_approved' WHEN $3='rejected' AND(SELECT entity_type FROM r0)='episode_script'THEN'season_outline_approved' WHEN $3='rejected' AND(SELECT entity_type FROM r0)='storyboard'THEN'episode_script_approved' ELSE current_stage END,status=CASE WHEN $3='approved' AND(SELECT entity_type FROM r0)='storyboard'THEN'stage_2_completed' ELSE 'waiting_review' END WHERE project_id=$2)SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM r)THEN true ELSE false END success,$2::text project_id,$7::text trace_id,'review'::text stage,$3::text status,jsonb_build_object('entity_type',(SELECT entity_type FROM r0),'entity_id',(SELECT entity_id FROM r0),'review_id',$1) data_ref,CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM r)THEN NULL ELSE jsonb_build_object('code','REVIEW_NOT_FOUND','message','review task not found','retryable',false)END error;

SELECT p.project_id,p.current_stage,p.test_mode,coalesce($2,(SELECT episode_id FROM drama.episode_outlines WHERE project_id=p.project_id AND status='approved' ORDER BY episode_number,version DESC LIMIT 1))episode_id,$3::int generation_version,$4::text trace_id,$5::text action,$6::text scene_id,$7::text shot_id FROM drama.projects p WHERE p.project_id=$1;

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{success:false,project_id:$json.project_id,trace_id:$json.trace_id,stage:'orchestrator',status:'failed',data_ref:null,metrics:{},error:{code:'BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED',message:'current project stage is not resumable',retryable:false}}}];

const b=$json.body||$json,a=b.action||'resume';if(!b.project_id)throw new Error('PROJECT_NOT_FOUND');if(!['review','resume','retry','regenerate','lock','unlock','select_primary','cancel'].includes(a))throw new Error('BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED');if(a==='review'&&(!b.review_id||!['approved','rejected'].includes(b.review_status)))throw new Error('BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED: review input');return [{json:{...b,action:a,generation_version:Number(b.generation_version||1),test_mode:Boolean(b.test_mode),trace_id:b.trace_id||`trace_stage3_${Date.now()}`}}];

parameters.query: WITH r0 AS(SELECT * FROM drama.review_tasks WHERE review_id=$1 AND project_id=$2),r AS(UPDATE drama.review_tasks SET review_status=$3,review_comment=$4,rejection_reason=$5,prompt_adjustment=$6,reviewed_at=now()WHERE review_id=$1 AND project_id=$2 RETURNING *),ga AS(UPDATE drama.generated_assets SET review_status=$3,review_comment=$4,rejection_reason=$5,selected_as_primary=CASE WHEN $3='approved'AND $7 THEN true ELSE selected_as_primary END WHERE asset_id=(SELECT entity_id FROM r0 WHERE entity_type='generated_asset')RETURNING *),cp AS(UPDATE drama.character_visual_profiles SET review_status='approved',lock_status=CASE WHEN $8 THEN'locked'ELSE lock_status END WHERE profile_id=(SELECT profile_id FROM ga WHERE entity_type='character'AND $3='approved'AND $7)),co AS(UPDATE drama.character_costumes SET review_status='approved',lock_status=CASE WHEN $8 THEN'locked'ELSE lock_status END WHERE profile_id=(SELECT profile_id FROM ga WHERE entity_type='character'AND $3='approved'AND $7)),lp AS(UPDATE drama.location_visual_profiles SET review_status='approved',lock_status=CASE WHEN $8 THEN'locked'ELSE lock_status END WHERE profile_id=(SELECT profile_id FROM ga WHERE entity_type='location'AND $3='approved'AND $7)),si AS(UPDATE drama.storyboard_images SET review_status=$3,review_comment=$4,rejection_reason=$5,prompt_adjustment=$6 WHERE storyboard_image_id=(SELECT entity_id FROM r0 WHERE entity_type='storyboard_image')RETURNING *),p AS(UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage=CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM si)AND $3='rejected'THEN'visual_assets_locked' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM ga)AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.character_visual_profiles WHERE project_id=$2 AND lock_status<>'locked')AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.location_visual_profiles WHERE project_id=$2 AND lock_status<>'locked')THEN'visual_assets_locked' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM si)AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images WHERE project_id=$2 AND is_current AND review_status<>'approved'AND storyboard_image_id<>(SELECT storyboard_image_id FROM si))THEN'storyboard_images_approved' ELSE current_stage END,status=CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM si)AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images WHERE project_id=$2 AND is_current AND review_status<>'approved'AND storyboard_image_id<>(SELECT storyboard_image_id FROM si))THEN'stage_3_completed' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM ga)THEN'waiting_asset_lock' ELSE'waiting_storyboard_image_review'END WHERE project_id=$2)SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM r)success,$2::text project_id,$9::text trace_id,'review'::text stage,$3::text status,jsonb_build_object('entity_type',(SELECT entity_type FROM r0),'entity_id',(SELECT entity_id FROM r0),'review_id',$1)data_ref,CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM r)THEN NULL ELSE jsonb_build_object('code','REVIEW_NOT_FOUND','message','review not found','retryable',false)END error;

WITH promoted AS(UPDATE drama.projects p SET current_stage='visual_assets_locked',status='waiting_asset_lock'WHERE p.project_id=$1 AND p.current_stage='visual_asset_review'AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.character_visual_profiles WHERE project_id=$1 AND lock_status<>'locked')AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.location_visual_profiles WHERE project_id=$1 AND lock_status<>'locked')RETURNING p.project_id),completed AS(UPDATE drama.projects p SET current_stage='storyboard_images_approved',status='stage_3_completed'WHERE p.project_id=$1 AND p.current_stage='storyboard_image_review'AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images WHERE project_id=$1 AND is_current)AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images WHERE project_id=$1 AND is_current AND review_status<>'approved')RETURNING p.project_id)SELECT p.project_id,CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM completed)THEN'storyboard_images_approved'WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM promoted)THEN'visual_assets_locked'ELSE p.current_stage END current_stage,p.test_mode,coalesce($2,(SELECT episode_id FROM drama.storyboards WHERE project_id=p.project_id AND status='approved'ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1))episode_id,$3::text shot_id,$4::int generation_version,$5::text trace_id,$6::text action,$7::jsonb payload FROM drama.projects p WHERE p.project_id=$1;

parameters.jsCode: const crypto=require('crypto'),b=$json.body||$json,p=b.payload||{},project_id=b.project_id||p.project_id,action=b.action||p.action||'resume',requested_stage=b.stage||p.stage||null;if(!project_id)throw new Error('PROJECT_NOT_FOUND: project_id is required');if(!['run','retry','regenerate','review','resume','cancel','lock','unlock','select_voice','process'].includes(action))throw new Error('BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED: unsupported stage 4 action');if(requested_stage&&!['orchestrator','image_to_video','voice_audio'].includes(requested_stage))throw new Error('BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED: unsupported stage 4 target');const entity_type=b.entity_type||p.entity_type||null,entity_id=b.entity_id||p.entity_id||null,shot_id=b.shot_id||p.shot_id||null,dialogue_id=b.dialogue_id||p.dialogue_id||null;return [{json:{project_id,episode_id:b.episode_id||p.episode_id||null,shot_id,dialogue_id,stage:'orchestrator',requested_stage,action,generation_version:Math.max(1,Number(b.generation_version||p.generation_version||1)),test_mode:b.test_mode===undefined?Boolean(p.test_mode):Boolean(b.test_mode),trace_id:b.trace_id||p.trace_id||('trace_stage4_'+crypto.randomUUID()),breakpoint:b.breakpoint||p.breakpoint||null,entity_type,entity_id,payload:{...p,requested_stage,review_id:b.review_id||p.review_id||null,entity_type,entity_id,shot_id,dialogue_id,review_status:b.review_status||p.review_status||null,review_comment:b.review_comment||p.review_comment||'',rejection_reason:b.rejection_reason||p.rejection_reason||'',prompt_adjustment:b.prompt_adjustment||p.prompt_adjustment||'',lock_after_approval:Boolean(b.lock_after_approval??p.lock_after_approval)}}}];

parameters.query: WITH ctx AS(SELECT p.*,coalesce($2::text,(SELECT es.episode_id FROM drama.episode_scripts es WHERE es.project_id=p.project_id AND es.status='approved'ORDER BY es.created_at LIMIT 1))resolved_episode_id FROM drama.projects p WHERE p.project_id=$1)SELECT ctx.project_id,ctx.current_stage,ctx.status,ctx.test_mode,ctx.resolved_episode_id episode_id,$3::text shot_id,$4::text dialogue_id,$5::int generation_version,$6::text trace_id,$7::text action,$8::text breakpoint,$9::jsonb payload,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM drama.storyboard_images i WHERE i.project_id=ctx.project_id AND i.episode_id=ctx.resolved_episode_id AND i.review_status='approved'AND i.is_current)approved_image_count,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM drama.shot_videos v WHERE v.project_id=ctx.project_id AND v.episode_id=ctx.resolved_episode_id AND v.review_status='approved'AND v.is_current)approved_video_count,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM drama.video_generation_tasks t WHERE t.project_id=ctx.project_id AND t.episode_id=ctx.resolved_episode_id AND t.status IN('submitting','processing'))video_processing_count,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM drama.dialogues d WHERE d.project_id=ctx.project_id AND d.episode_id=ctx.resolved_episode_id)dialogue_count,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM drama.dialogue_audio a WHERE a.project_id=ctx.project_id AND a.episode_id=ctx.resolved_episode_id AND a.status='succeeded'AND a.auto_qc_status<>'failed'AND a.is_current)audio_success_count,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM drama.tts_generation_tasks t WHERE t.project_id=ctx.project_id AND t.episode_id=ctx.resolved_episode_id AND t.status IN('submitting','processing'))audio_processing_count,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM drama.voice_profiles v WHERE v.project_id=ctx.project_id AND v.review_status='approved'AND v.lock_status='locked'AND v.is_default)locked_voice_count,(SELECT count(*)::int FROM drama.episode_audio_plans ap WHERE ap.project_id=ctx.project_id AND ap.episode_id=ctx.resolved_episode_id AND ap.status='ready')audio_plan_ready_count FROM ctx;

parameters.jsCode: const x=$json;if(!x.project_id)throw new Error('PROJECT_NOT_FOUND');if(!x.episode_id)throw new Error('EPISODE_SCRIPT_NOT_APPROVED: no approved episode');const allowed=['storyboard_images_approved','stage_3_completed','image_to_video','video_tasks_submitted','video_processing','shot_videos_generated','shot_video_review','shot_videos_approved','voice_audio','voice_profiles_created','voice_profile_review','voice_profiles_locked','tts_processing','dialogue_audio_generated','audio_processing','audio_review','audio_ready','audio_plan_completed','stage_4_completed','stage_4_failed'];if(!allowed.includes(x.current_stage)&&!x.breakpoint)throw new Error('STORYBOARD_NOT_APPROVED: stage 3 is not complete');const images=Number(x.approved_image_count),videos=Number(x.approved_video_count),dialogues=Number(x.dialogue_count),audio=Number(x.audio_success_count),plan=Number(x.audio_plan_ready_count),complete=images>0&&videos>=images&&dialogues>0&&audio>=dialogues&&plan>0,bp=x.breakpoint||x.current_stage,retry=['retry','regenerate'].includes(x.action),requested=x.payload?.requested_stage||null;let launch_video=!complete&&images>videos,launch_audio=!complete&&dialogues>audio;if(['video_tasks_submitted','video_processing'].includes(bp)&&!retry&&Number(x.video_processing_count)>0)launch_video=false;if(['dialogue_audio_generated','audio_processing'].includes(bp)&&!retry&&Number(x.audio_processing_count)>0)launch_audio=false;if(bp==='shot_videos_approved')launch_video=false;if(bp==='audio_plan_completed')launch_audio=false;if(bp==='storyboard_images_approved'||bp==='stage_3_completed'){launch_video=images>videos;launch_audio=dialogues>audio;}if(requested==='image_to_video')launch_audio=false;if(requested==='voice_audio')launch_video=false;return [{json:{...x,breakpoint:bp,launch_video,launch_audio,stage4_complete:complete}}];

parameters.query: UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage=CASE WHEN $4 THEN'stage_4_completed'WHEN $2 THEN'video_processing'WHEN $3 THEN'audio_processing'ELSE current_stage END,status=CASE WHEN $4 THEN'stage_4_completed'WHEN $2 THEN'video_processing'WHEN $3 THEN'audio_processing'ELSE status END,config=config||jsonb_build_object('stage_4',jsonb_build_object('breakpoint',$5::text,'video_dispatched',$2,'audio_dispatched',$3,'trace_id',$6::text,'updated_at',now()))WHERE project_id=$1 RETURNING $7::jsonb context;
